fields.vision: By 2028, every claims decision at Nordkap is supported - never silently made - by AI, cutting fraud leakage 25% while keeping adjusters in charge of every customer-affecting outcome.
fields.alignment: Supports the group strategy pillars "profitable growth" (loss-ratio improvement) and "effortless claims" (cycle-time reduction) without adding headcount.
fields.metrics: Fraud detection rate at FNOL; false-positive referral rate; claims cycle time; adjuster satisfaction; model-governance audit findings.

rows.milestone: Fraud-detection pilot live in one region; AI governance board operating
Fraud scoring national; document-intake automation in production
AI-supported decisioning across claims lifecycle incl. subrogation
